svg.title: One Vision, Four Income Rivers — Zero2Billionaires
svg.desc: Garden of Eden with four rivers: Pishon top-left, Gihon top-right, Hiddekel bottom-left, Euphrates bottom-right
svg.text: Just as four rivers flowed from the Garden of Eden to water the whole earth,
Z2B gives every builder four income rivers — watering your financial garden day and night.
